title: ferray-autodiff: no AddAssign/SubAssign/MulAssign/DivAssign implementations
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

No compound assignment operators are implemented. Accumulation loops like 'sum += f(x_i)' require AddAssign. Without it, users must write 'sum = sum + f(x_i)'. Add {Add,Sub,Mul,Div}Assign for both DualNumber-DualNumber and DualNumber-scalar T operations.
